hero.mission: Making daily shopping easier and more enjoyable with fresh, affordable, quality products — your go-to for convenience, value, and a great experience.

about.heading: Three Generations, One Commitment
about.milestone1949Text: In 1949, our grandfather opened a small shop in Saida, roasting nuts and crafting sweets with care — serving the community one handful at a time.
about.milestone2009Text: In 2009, a new generation took the helm, expanding the family vision into three distinct brands while keeping the same commitment to quality.
about.milestoneNowText: Today, ADI Lebanon is a group of brands rooted in Saida — grown from one shop to serving families and businesses across Lebanon.
about.milestone2025Text: In 2025, ADI opened a new production and distribution facility, positioning the group to meet national and international demand.
about.quote: From one shop in Saida to three brands serving Lebanon — the same family, the same care.

brands.heading: Three Brands, One Family
brands.subheading: Each brand serves a different need — together they reflect 75+ years of passion for quality and community.
brands.adiDescription: Convenience stores offering snacks, drinks, groceries, and everyday essentials. Open early to late — everything you need, right when you need it.
brands.nutnowDescription: Imports and distributes top-quality nuts to shops, markets, and major supermarkets across Lebanon. From source to shelf, freshness guaranteed.
brands.adissoDescription: A modern café serving fresh juices, desserts, and baked goods crafted daily. A place to pause, refresh, and enjoy something made with care.

locations.heading: Visit Our Branches
locations.subheading: Two convenient locations in Saida — open early to late, every day of the week.

contact.heading: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subheading: Have a question, a bulk order inquiry, or just want to say hello? We respond quickly.
